## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8d5bc48fec667aefa2d572019a4a9f536d849ac0c3db8c38228ac602f5828e99)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'paysafe-gbp-virtual-assistant-lib-fe' @ 2.0.4 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
